mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notify_action_token (token, target_type, target_id, action, expires_at, create_time) VALUES (#{token}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{action}, #{expiresAt}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, token, target_type, target_id, action, expires_at, used_at, create_time FROM notify_action_token WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.update: UPDATE notify_action_token SET used_at = NOW() WHERE token = #{token} AND used_at IS NULL
UPDATE notify_action_token SET used_at = NOW() WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND used_at IS NULL
